# @formosaic/base-web

> Base Web (Uber) field components for @formosaic/core. 13 field types using baseui components with Styletron CSS-in-JS styling.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/base-web/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/base-web/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@formosaic/base-web](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formosaic/base-web)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-hook-form`, `@formosaic/core`, `baseui`, `styletron-engine-monolithic`, `styletron-react`

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createBaseWebFieldRegistry()` -- Creates the default Base Web field registry (`Record<string, React.JSX.Element>`) for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Editable Field Components (12)
- `Textbox` -- baseui `Input`
- `Number` -- baseui `Input` (type="number")
- `Toggle` -- baseui `Checkbox` with `STYLE_TYPE.toggle`
- `Dropdown` -- baseui `Select`
- `MultiSelect` -- baseui `Select` with `multi` prop
- `DateControl` -- Native `<input type="date">` (React 19 fallback)
- `Slider` -- baseui `Slider`
- `RadioGroup` -- baseui `RadioGroup` + `Radio`
- `CheckboxGroup` -- baseui `Checkbox`
- `Textarea` -- baseui `Textarea`
- `DynamicFragment` -- `<input type="hidden">`

### Read-Only Field Components (1)
- `ReadOnly` -- `ReadOnlyText`

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display
- `StatusMessage` -- Form status display
- `FormLoading` -- Loading state

### Helpers
- `FieldClassName()` -- Build CSS class name with error state
- `GetFieldDataTestId()` -- Build data-testid attribute
- `formatDateTime()` -- Format date string for display
- `DocumentLinksStrings` -- Default string literals for document links UI

## Code Example

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, Formosaic } from "@formosaic/core";
import { createBaseWebFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/base-web";
import { Client as Styletron } from "styletron-engine-monolithic";
import { Provider as StyletronProvider } from "styletron-react";
import { LightTheme, BaseProvider } from "baseui";

const engine = new Styletron();

const formConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
    role: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Role", options: [
      { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
      { value: "user", label: "User" },
    ]},
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name", "role"],
};

function App() {
  return (
    <StyletronProvider value={engine}>
      <BaseProvider theme={LightTheme}>
        <RulesEngineProvider>
          <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createBaseWebFieldRegistry()}>
            <Formosaic formConfig={formConfig} saveData={async (data) => data} />
          </InjectedFieldProvider>
        </RulesEngineProvider>
      </BaseProvider>
    </StyletronProvider>
  );
}
```
